final:
module shift_register (
  input clk,
  input load,
  input [7:0] data,
  output reg [7:0] q
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (load) begin
      q <= data;
    end else begin
      q <= {1'b0, q[7:1]};
    end
  end

endmodule
